source.section: 4 - AN/ASQ-228 ATFLIR Targeting Pod > 4.5 - Pointing Methods > 4.5.4 - Waypoint Slaved

steps.action: Select FLIR page and press the Sensor Control Switch in the direction of the selected DDI.
steps.voiced: Select the FLIR page, then press Sensor Control Switch toward the active DDI.

steps.action: The Select Focus Diamond indicates what display is selected.
steps.voiced: Confirm the Select Focus Diamond appears on the FLIR DDI.

steps.action: On HSI (Horizontal Situation Indicator) page, select desired waypoint using the OSBs (Option Select Button) next to UP or DOWN arrows.
steps.voiced: On the HSI page, use the UP or DOWN OSBs to select the desired waypoint.

steps.action: Press OSB next to WYPT (boxed = selected)
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to WYPT — confirm it boxes.

steps.action: Press on OSB next to WPSDG to designate waypoint as the target point (boxed = selected)
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to WPSDG to designate the waypoint as target — confirm it boxes.

steps.action: Targeting point will automatically slew to the selected waypoint.
steps.voiced: Confirm the targeting pod slews automatically to the selected waypoint.

steps.action: Use the TDC (Throttle Designator Controller) Aft/Fwd/Left/Right controls to slew the targeting pod reticle over the desired target if adjustments are required.
steps.voiced: Use TDC Aft/Fwd/Left/Right to fine-slew the pod reticle onto target if needed.
